metadata.title: Swift Double Kill with Smooth Peeks and Tight Angles in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a clean 2v1 where smart positioning and calm aim turn the round around. Timing those peeks just right was key to securing the win.
What’s your go-to angle for clutch moments? Share your favorite spots below!

Drop your best clutch plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
